identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Tactical Guardian' aesthetic—empowering, serious, and high-contrast for safety, but feminine and sleek, avoiding pink-washing.
principles: Fusion: Tactical Gear x High-End Fashion Tech
Emotion: Trust, Alertness, Calm in Chaos
Function: Fitts's Law (Big Buttons), Thumb-Zone Navigation
Dark Mode First: Low light emission for discretion

typography.instructions: Import 'Chivo' from Google Fonts. Use it for all headings to give a 'Humanist Tech' feel. Use 'Inter' for UI elements for maximum legibility.

containers.card: rounded-xl p-6 bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

sos_button.style: rounded-full w-48 h-48 md:w-64 md:h-64 flex items-center justify-center bg-red-500 text-white font-black text-4xl shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(239,68,68,0.6)] border-4 border-red-400/50 cursor-pointer active:scale-95 transition-transform
sos_button.interaction: Hold to activate (3s delay) to prevent false positives. Pulse animation on idle.

nav_bar.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-zinc-950/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-zinc-800 flex justify-around items-center z-50
nav_bar.item: text-zinc-500 hover:text-violet-500 transition-colors flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-xs

fake_call_screen.style: fullscreen bg-black z-[100] flex flex-col items-center justify-between py-20
fake_call_screen.notes: Must mimic iOS/Android call screen exactly. Blur background image of a contact.

map_view.style: w-full h-[60vh] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-zinc-800 grayscale invert contrast-125
map_view.notes: Use dark mode map tiles (CartoDB DarkMatter or Mapbox Dark).

images.alt: Confident woman walking in city at night
images.usage: Landing page hero background or split section

images.alt: Close up of smartphone in hand at night

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is WCAG AA compliant. Use Zinc-400 on Zinc-950 for secondary text, White for primary.
accessibility.screen_readers: All icons must have aria-label. SOS button must announce status clearly.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Set up the Tailwind config to extend colors with the 'Zinc' and 'Red/Violet' palette defined above.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that enforces the dark theme (bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-50).
4. Build the 'SOS Button' as a standalone complex component with hold-to-trigger logic.
5. Use the provided images for the Landing Page. Do not use placeholders.
6. For the Map, use a placeholder div with class 'bg-zinc-900' if a library is not yet selected, but style it to look like a dark map.
7. Ensure the 'Fake Call' page hides the nav bar and looks like a native phone screen.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
